name: Impossible Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------CHEESECAKE TOPPING-----------------------------
1. Combine 1 cup Sour Cream with 2 tablespoons Vanilla Extract and 2 tablespoons Sugar.
2. Heat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat together the milk, vanilla extract, eggs, sugar, and Bisquick until smooth.
5. Add the cream cheese and blend for an additional 2 minutes on high.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pie plate.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes (or until set), or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool.
8. Mix the cheesecake topping using the combined ingredients of sour cream, vanilla extract, and sugar.
9. Carefully spread the topping over the cooled cheesecake.
10. Serve with canned pie filling or fresh fruit if desired.
HIGH ALTITUDE: Bake for 45-50 minutes. From: BISQUICK RECIPE CLUB LISA CRAWLEY TSPN00B
